choices: holds references to agent sequencers (does not create agents)
creates every agent and driver in build_phase
items.explain: The vsequencer stores handles wired in connect_phase.

choices: starts sub-sequences on agent sequencers via those refs
drives pins directly on the DUT interface
sets is_active for the whole env once
items.explain: The vseq coordinates sub-sequences across handles.

items.prompt: Parallel coordination across two agent sequencers often uses…
choices: fork … join around two start() calls

items.prompt: Starting a sub-sequence on an unwired (null) sequencer ref should fail or stall—you must wire refs before start.
items.explain: Missing uart_sqr/spi_sqr refs break coordination at start time.
